trans-unit.note: Table ICM Config. Package - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The target company must be different from the source company.
trans-unit.target: Der Zielmandant muss sich vom Quellmandant unterscheiden.
trans-unit.note: Table ICM Config. Package - NamedType Text001Err

Table ICM Table - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: This table is not included in the license. Active status cannot be set to true.
trans-unit.target: Diese Tabelle ist nicht in der Lizenz enthalten. Der Status „Aktiv“ kann nicht auf „true“ gesetzt werden.
trans-unit.note: Table ICM Table - NamedType Text001Lbl

trans-unit.source: Only tables with subtype "Normal" can be set to active.
trans-unit.target: Nur bei Tabelen mit dem Typ "Normal" kann das Feld Aktiv auf wahr gesetzt werden.
trans-unit.note: Table ICM Table - NamedType Text002Lbl

Codeunit ICM Management - NamedType Text001Lbl

trans-unit.source: The Field Active has been set to %1 for all filtered table lines.
trans-unit.target: Der „Aktiv“-Status wurde für alle gefilterten Tabellenzeilen auf %1 gesetzt.
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ICM Management - NamedType Text002Lbl
Codeunit ICM Management - NamedType Text003Lbl
Codeunit ICM Management - NamedType Text004Lbl

trans-unit.source: The list of Tables is being updated...\\
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ICM Management - NamedType Text005Lbl

trans-unit.source: The list of Tables is being copied...\\
trans-unit.note: Codeunit ICM Management - NamedType Text006Lbl
Codeunit ICM Management - NamedType Text007Lbl
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Property Caption
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control General - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code of the configuration package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Code des Konfigurationspakets an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control Code - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control Code - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the description of the configuration package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Beschreibung des Konfigurationspakets an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control Description - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control Description - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the No. of Tables for the configuration package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Anzahl der Tabellen an die im Konfigurationspaket enthalten sind.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control No. of Tables - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control No. of Tables - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the source company for the configuration package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Quellmandant für das Konfigurationspaket an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control Source Company Name - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control Source Company Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the target company for the configuration package.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Zielmandant für das Konfigurationspaket an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control Target Company Name - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Control Target Company Name - Property Caption
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Action Configuration Packages - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Action Configuration Packages - Property Caption
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Action ICM Setup - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Action ICM Setup - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Copy tables from one company to another
trans-unit.target: Tabellen von einem Mandanten zu einem anderen Mandanten kopieren
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Config. Package Card - Action Copy Tables - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Action Copy Tables - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Copy an existing configuration package to create a new package based on the same content.
trans-unit.target: Kopiert ein vorhandenes Konfigurationspaket, um ein neues Paket auf Grundlage desselben Inhalts zu erstellen.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Config. Package Card - Action CopyConfigPackage - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Action CopyConfigPackage - Property Caption
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Action Create new Company - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Card - Action Create new Company - Property Caption
Page ICM Config. Package Fields - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the Caption of the field
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Beschreibung des Feldes an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Config. Package Fields - Control ICM Field Caption - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Fields - Control ICM Field Caption - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the ID of the field for the table
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Nr. eines Tabellenfelds an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Config. Package Fields - Control ICM Field ID - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Fields - Control ICM Field ID - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the Name of the field
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Namen des Felds an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Config. Package Fields - Control ICM Field Name - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Config. Package Fields - Control ICM Field Name - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies whether the field is included in the migration
trans-unit.target: Gibt an ob das Feld in der Datenübernahme enthalten ist.

Page ICM Tables List - Property Caption
Page ICM Tables List - NamedType Text001Lbl
Page ICM Tables List - NamedType Text002Lbl

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the table information is active.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an, ob die Tabelleninformation aktiv ist.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control Active - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the company.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Namen des Mandanten an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control Company Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the table has data per company.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an, ob die Tabelle Daten pro Mandant hat.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control Data Per Company - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the table contains records.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an, ob die Tabelle Datensätze enthält.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control Has Records - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the subtype of the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Tabellenunterart der Tabelle an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control ICM Apply Table Fields - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the unique identifier of the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die eindeutige Kennung der Tabelle an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control ID - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies if the table is included in the license.
trans-unit.target: Gibt an, ob die Tabelle in der Lizenz enthalten ist.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control Included in the License - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Namen der Tabelle an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control Name - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of fields available for migration.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Anzahl der verfügbaren Felder für die Migration an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control No. of Fields Available - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of fields included for migration.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Anzahl der eingeschlossenen Felder für die Migration an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control No. of Fields Included - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the number of records in the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Anzahl der Datensätze in der Tabelle an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control Record Count - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the caption of the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Beschreibung der Tabelle an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control Table Caption - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Specifies the subtype of the table.
trans-unit.target: Gibt die Tabellenunterart der Tabelle an.
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Control Table Subtype - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Tables List - Control Group - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the name of a the company.
trans-unit.target: Gibt den Namen des Mandanten an.

Page ICM Tables List - Control Company - Property Caption

Page ICM Tables List - Action Create new Company - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Set the Active field to true or false, existing filters are considered
trans-unit.target: Das Feld Aktiv aktivieren oder deaktivieren, vorhandene Filter werden berücksichtigt
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Action Set Field Active - Property ToolTip

trans-unit.source: Set Field Active to true or false
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Action Set Field Active - Property Caption
Page ICM Tables List - Action Toggle Active Tables Visibility - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Tables List - Action Toggle Active Tables Visibility - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Fills the table with data from the current Company
trans-unit.target: Füllt die Tabellen mit Daten aus dem aktuellen Mandanten
trans-unit.note: Page ICM Tables List - Action Update tables - Property ToolTip
Page ICM Tables List - Action Update tables - Property Caption
Report ICM Copy Config Package - Property Caption
Report ICM Copy Config Package - NamedType PackageAlreadyExistsErr

trans-unit.source: The target company must be different from the source company.
trans-unit.target: Der Zielmandant muss sich vom Quellmandant unterscheiden.
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Config Package - NamedType Text001Err
Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control GroupName - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The company to copy data from
trans-unit.target: Der Mandant, aus dem Daten kopiert werden sollen
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control FromCompany - Property ToolTip
Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control FromCompany - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: Specifies the code that the new configuration package gets after copying.
trans-unit.target: Legt den Code fest, den das neue Konfigurationspaket nach dem Kopieren erhält.
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control Package - Property ToolTip
Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control Package - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The company to copy data to
trans-unit.target: Der Mandant, in den Daten kopiert werden sollen
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control ToCompany - Property ToolTip
Report ICM Copy Config Package - Control ToCompany - Property Caption
Report ICM Copy Tables - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The “From Company” field must be filled.
trans-unit.target: Das Feld „Mandant Von“ muss ausgefüllt werden.
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Tables - NamedType Text001Err

trans-unit.source: The “To Company” field must be filled.
trans-unit.target: Das Feld „Mandant Zu“ muss ausgefüllt werden.
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Tables - NamedType Text002Err

trans-unit.source: The target company must be different from the source company.
trans-unit.target: Der Zielmandant muss sich vom Quellmandant unterscheiden.
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Tables - NamedType Text003Err
Report ICM Copy Tables - Control Options - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The company to copy data from
trans-unit.target: Der Mandant, aus dem Daten kopiert werden sollen
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Tables - Control FromCompany - Property ToolTip
Report ICM Copy Tables - Control FromCompany - Property Caption

trans-unit.source: The company to copy data to
trans-unit.target: Der Mandant, in den Daten kopiert werden sollen
trans-unit.note: Report ICM Copy Tables - Control ToCompany - Property ToolTip
Report ICM Copy Tables - Control ToCompany - Property Caption

Enum ICM Apply Table Fields - EnumValue Some Fields - Property Caption
